core_mechanism: Approximation of a continuous first-order wave/transport operator by a local, translation-invariant unitary update rule on a periodic lattice (a cellular automaton), whose momentum-space dispersion relation develops spurious extra zero-modes ('doubling') as an aliasing artifact of periodic sampling, cured by staggering an auxiliary internal index on a sublattice.
brief_reason: The abstract's whole method is a local lattice update rule (the Dirac QCA) approximating a continuum first-order equation that exhibits Fermion Doubling and is fixed by staggering an extra artificial flavor on a diamond sublattice, with the two-point correlation (Green's) function computed for both the doubled and de-doubled versions.
